rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RENNA HOLMES
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order And For Santions, Etc.
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Monday, March 10, 2008. 1) Petitioner Rhonda Colvin's motion for a protective order is denied. = (610/BEC)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RENNA HOLMES
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Nonobjection Answers To Form Interrogatories,
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Monday, March 10, 2008. 2) Defendant Dionne Choyce's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories (set #2), request for production of documents (set #2), and for an order to deem certain matters admitted (set#2) is Granted in part. The Court finds good cause to order petitioner to respond to the specified discovery within 21 days of notice of this order as defendant Choyce was neither involved in the proceedings relating to the cross-complaint nor the appeal of the denial of petitioner's motion pursuant to CCP 425.16. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. = (610/BEC)
